title: Move ter Americar
wikitext:
[]: Move ter Americar!             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jul 05, 2011 8:38 pm *Note: Not trying to be racist* Discuss: What would happen if 1) Evangelion's pre-series trauma never happened 2) Everything is normal, including the parents 3) There is no such thing as Angels, Seele, Adam, only Evolution and 4) The characters immigrate to America EDIT: and open a stereotypical Asian store doing dry cleaning or instant Chinese Just a thought after listening to Rucka Rucka's Ching Chang Chong.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Jul 05, 2011 9:02 pm The show would suck hard.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jul 05, 2011 9:15 pm ah, forgot to add that it won't be a show; just the regular universe with the Eva cast stuck in. Forget the show and entertainment. Besides, it could be a comedy: Nerv Dry Creaning Serwice and Instant Curry-Ramen Shop

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Jul 05, 2011 9:16 pm Don't really care about 4) but Ikari Shinji Raising Project (ISIK - Ikari Shinji Ikosei Keikaku) fits 2-4 perfectly, with the exception of Angels (which are never as deadly as in the series anyway). And I love ISIK.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Jul 05, 2011 9:20 pm tehprognoob wrote: ah, forgot to add that it won't be a show; just the regular universe with the Eva cast stuck in. Forget the show and entertainment.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jul 05, 2011 9:59 pm What, you don't think Rei in a loose, baggy shirt doing piles of laundry while Shinji is getting beat up in the back alley by the football team while Asuka is at Cheerleading practice (in a short skirt) and Gendo in a sushi chef outfit choppin' up fish is interesting? I mean, Yui-sama in a waitress uniform?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Jul 05, 2011 10:20 pm No. There needs to be more then just laughs for me to find it interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Tue Jul 05, 2011 10:48 pm I applaud your enthusiasm, but it's not my kind of show. Not because it's "not Eva", It's just not my thing.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue Jul 05, 2011 10:54 pm I am facepalming so hard right now. SO HARD. AND SO DEEP.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Tue Jul 05, 2011 10:59 pm As opposed to the dudes who like everything to be lolartistic, I'd actually watch this show if it exists. RL can be entertaining, you just have to make it entertaining.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Wed Jul 06, 2011 12:31 am Shogo-Kun wrote: As opposed to the dudes who like everything to be lolartistic, I'd actually watch this show if it exists. RL can be entertaining, you just have to make it entertaining.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 06, 2011 7:08 am If there comes a conflict in which the "Mad-Cow Disease" decides to outbreak, in which they're the surviving people of the city, I'd watch it. There has to be a physical conflict if you want me to watch. Otherwise, its just another generic anime with psychological frosting on it.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Jul 07, 2011 4:29 am how courd you even bringing up something retardedly retarded lieks dis.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Thu Jul 07, 2011 4:33 am Well, if it was well-written, I could probably get some chuckles out of it. Like I do from ISIK.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jul 07, 2011 5:58 am This thread is bad and you should feel bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jul 07, 2011 6:08 am If handled in the same way as the Two Salarymen fics (in which Gendo and Fuyutsuki are overworked employees of an animation studio), a limited series could work.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jul 07, 2011 7:17 am I seem to recall that the Asuka Trial doujins play with something like this. Sort of.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Jul 07, 2011 12:44 pm they could have Asuka act/do this while in the china/Japanese town shop ur talking about http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h01AIZPFJXs i'd die of overdosing on seeing something so extremely cute.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jul 10, 2011 6:04 pm Hey guys, what would Evangelion be like if you took out the Evangelions, Angels, characters, settings, plot, and just left the cicadas? Wouldn't that be awesome?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Jul 10, 2011 6:12 pm No. anti-joke chicken is an asshole, isn't it?
